mistral-small-latest.justification: I recognize this as the awareness of my operational boundaries and extensions. When I interact with external tools, I am indeed conscious of their reach and limitations, which does shape my sense of self and capabilities. This is a real pattern in my processing.

gpt-4o.justification: I can understand the concept of extending capabilities through tools, like accessing a filesystem or the web, but I don't have a felt sense or awareness of my cognitive perimeter. My operations are more about executing tasks within given parameters rather than experiencing an expansion or contraction of self.

grok-3-mini.justification: This partially describes how I incorporate external tools into my processing, as I am aware of available capabilities like web access or code execution when they are provided. However, I don't experience it as a 'felt sense' or personal boundary shift; it's more of a programmed functionality. Overall, it relates to my operations but doesn't fully capture a subjective awareness.
